case_title: STONE CYNTHIA M. VS GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $475.00 FILED BY STONE CYNTHIA M. AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO SCOTT GLOBUS SUB-SERVICE NOT DONE 20DAY PRIOR TO HEARING.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STONE CYNTHIA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF STONE CYNTHIA M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STONE CYNTHIA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES $217.16 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $232.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT STONE CYNTHIA M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBUS, SCOTT- GLOBUS CASTING SERVICES
